_meta.description: Snapshot of recent payer policy changes for oncology drugs. Production should be populated by a scheduled crawler.

diffs.summary: Added TMB-H tumor-agnostic indication; removed prior step-therapy with chemotherapy for MSI-H solid tumors.

diff.text: TMB-H (≥10 mut/Mb) solid tumors per FDA tumor-agnostic approval (KEYNOTE-158).
Trial of platinum-based chemotherapy required prior to pembrolizumab for MSI-H tumors.
Now requires MSI/dMMR or TMB report from CLIA-certified lab; FoundationOne CDx, MSK-IMPACT, or Tempus xT accepted.

diffs.summary: Expanded BRCA testing requirement to include somatic + germline; HRD positivity now sufficient for ovarian.

diff.text: HRD-positive ovarian cancer maintenance (post-platinum response), independent of BRCA status.
BRCA1/2 testing now accepts germline OR somatic; previously germline-only.
Cite NCCN OVAR-PARP and FDA approval (Dec 2018, expanded 2022).

diffs.summary: Now accepts ribociclib or abemaciclib as alternative CDK4/6i; second-line eligibility expanded.

diff.text: Ribociclib + AI and abemaciclib + AI accepted as therapeutically equivalent first-line.
Second-line eligibility no longer requires endocrine resistance documentation; progression-on-prior-line is sufficient.

diffs.summary: HER2-low (IHC 1+ or IHC 2+/ISH-) breast cancer indication added.

diff.text: HER2-low metastatic breast cancer (≥1 prior chemo); IHC 1+ or IHC 2+/ISH- accepted per DESTINY-Breast04.
Pathology report with HER2 IHC + ISH (if IHC 2+) required.

diffs.summary: First-line use restricted to KRAS G12C-mutant NSCLC patients ineligible for sotorasib (rare).

diff.text: Sotorasib is now preferred first-line; adagrasib reserved for sotorasib intolerance or progression.
